name: Sam Vaknin's Musings: Geopolitics and Economics

episodes.title: Special Minds of Cult Members
episodes.description:
Cult leader both in-group and Other

Secure base: charismatic overconfidence

Halo effect (leader reflects on members)

Recipe for success

Escapism codified and legitimized

External enemies (morality play): pseudo-righteousness and ostentatious virtue

Mass psychegenic illness and shared psychotic disorder

Cult Dynamics

Cult Leader's Relationship with the Cult Members

Leadership in Mega Cults

episodes.title: USA’s Hobson’s Choice: Personality Cult vs. Ideological Tyranny (Brussels Morning)
episodes.description:
Read the column:https://brusselsmorning.com/usas-hobsons-choice-personality-cult-vs-ideological-tyranny/58033/

In the forthcoming elections in the USA, the electorate faces a choice between a personality cult and an ideological tyranny. 

Personality cults such as Trump’s come to an abrupt end with the demise or assassination of the adulated leader. Their outcomes and impacts are easily reversible. 

Ideological tyrannies – namely both the far Left and the far Right - are far more insidious and all-pervasive and way more difficult to eradicate.
